checks.description: Guardrail: ensure wrap‑around behavior does not violate stability after reset.
checks.pass_condition: When Secs reaches 59 and wraps to 0, Mins must be 1 and Hours must remain unchanged; when both Mins and Secs wrap to 0, Hours must increment by 1 (mod 24). No X or Z values are permitted on these outputs during the observation window.
checks.trigger_condition: After observing Secs == 59 and a subsequent clock edge.

checks.pass_condition: Secs increments by 1 each clock cycle unless it is 59, in which case it wraps to 0 and Mins increments by 1. When Mins wraps from 59 to 0, Hours increments by 1 (mod 24). All outputs must remain defined (no X/Z) throughout the observation window.
checks.trigger_condition: During the first 5 clock cycles after reset release.
